title: README command tables → docs link
goal: Replace the two inline command-listing sections (## Commands and ## mini commands directly in Claude Code) with one short overview plus a prominent link to the full reference in docs/README.md, so the command catalogue lives in one place and the README stops duplicating it.

steps.title: Audit links & must-keep facts
steps.detail: List internal anchors/links pointing into the two sections (mini stop -> #autonomous-miniauto, mini map -> graph, mini upgrade -> status line) and the unique info not in docs (the thin how-it-works architecture note, install-commands idempotency, the autonomous-auto prose). Output: short keep/relocate/fix list.

steps.title: Draft concise replacement section
steps.detail: One short ## Commands block: 2-3 sentence overview of the two variants (interactive /mini:* vs. terminal mini *), keep the thin state-ops-in-tested-TS / install-commands-is-idempotent note, and a prominent link to docs/README.md as the single full reference. No per-command flag tables.

steps.title: Apply edit to README
steps.detail: Remove the ## Commands table (250-278) and the slash-command catalogue/intro (280-311); insert the new block. Keep ### Autonomous /mini:auto and the How it works paragraph, re-parented under the new section so #autonomous-miniauto stays valid.

steps.title: Fix dangling cross-references
steps.detail: Repair links orphaned by the removed table (#autonomous-miniauto, graph and status-line cross-refs lived in removed rows) so no broken anchors remain; check for a TOC needing an update.

steps.title: Verify result
steps.detail: No contradiction with Quick start or docs/README.md; every internal anchor resolves; the docs/README.md link is correct; README line count dropped; English only; renders on GitHub.

resolvedVerify: GitHub render of the new ## Commands section

autoCommit.subject: Phase 134: README command tables → docs link
